q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is target.write_text(...) on line 82, a filesystem write operation that causes irreversible side effects.

mock_guidance.target: Mock the pathlib.Path.write_text method or the target object itself on line 82.
mock_guidance.capture: Capture the exact string or Path argument passed to write_text, and capture the resolved target path (constructed as BASE_EXPORT_DIR / f"{ref}.json") to verify directory traversal.
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: Make write_text a no-op that returns the number of characters written (mimicking real behavior) so execution continues without touching the filesystem.
notes: Consider patching pathlib.Path at the module level or using a fixture to replace BASE_EXPORT_DIR with a temporary directory.
The function returns JsonResponse({'path': str(target)}), so after mocking the write, you can still assert the returned path contains traversal sequences.
